name: Formpad
one_liner: Form builder for indie SaaS founders — auto-generates forms backed by Supabase. (The product is the form-flair repo.)
notes: form-flair IS formpad (confirmed 2026-06-04). Pre-factory Lovable build (created 2026-03-22 — predates Hamzaish, so onboarded INTO the factory, not built with it; listed on SHOWCASE.md's onboarded line, never the built-with table). LIVE at formpad.app — verified 2026-07-03 (HTTP 200, real product page); site launched outside the factory flow and portfolio metadata was reconciled same day (stage mvp→launch, prod_url filled — it had drifted). Has real code (src/, supabase/) + Playwright/Vitest tests at ~/Claude/form-flair (map in code-paths.local.json). Next: /work-on formpad → wire analytics IDs so telemetry sees it, then decide the growth path.
